message:
fix(combinator): drain pending queue after cancel returns a permit

Both Bulkhead::cancel_entry and RateLimiter::cancel_entry now accept
a `now` parameter and call process_queue after returning a cancelled
permit/token to the pool. This prevents queue starvation when a
granted-but-unclaimed entry is cancelled without any subsequent
process_queue trigger.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
